pwreset.title: Set a new password
pwreset.intro: Choose a new password for your smyst.com account (at least 8 characters).
pwreset.errorReset: Reset failed. Please request a new link.

auth.errorForgot: Request failed. Please try again later.
auth.forgotSent: If an account exists, we have sent you an email to reset your password.

trust.title: Security, privacy and operations
trust.intro: smyst.com starts with clear boundaries, private defaults and a documented release gate.
trust.item1Text: App, files and data are separated into security and privacy zones.
trust.item2Text: Private profiles and uploads stay noindex and are bound to the login session.
trust.item3Text: Export, account deletion and logout of all sessions are built into the product.
trust.item4Text: File type, category, size, quota and owner path are checked server-side.
trust.item5Text: JSON errors, request IDs, rate-limit headers and 405 handling are documented.
trust.item6Text: Answers must stay clear, traceable and free of false claims of being a real person.
trust.openText: Real iPhone/Android approval, push notifications, malware scanning and very high load limits are separate sign-offs. These points are not hidden - they are listed in release reports before production.

myTwins.title: My Twins
myTwins.subtitle: All private and public twin profiles of your account.
myTwins.signInTitle: Sign in to see your twins
myTwins.signInText: Sign in so your private twins are linked to your account only.
myTwins.emptyText: Create a twin first, then upload memories or knowledge.

seo.title: smyst.com | AI Twins, Digital Profiles and Twin Chat
seo.description: smyst.com lets you build a digital AI twin of yourself — with its own profile, knowledge, and memories — and chat with it anytime.
seo.keywords: AI twin, digital twin, knowledge profile, memories, smyst.com

start.emptyText: Choose a name above or start writing. The selected twin stays fixed in the top right.
start.pickerNoMatches: No matching real profiles found. Search by name, topic, or category.
start.pickerEmptyCreate: No real profile yet. Create a twin first.
start.pickerLogin: Sign in to load real profiles.
start.profilesErrorTitle: Profiles could not be loaded right now
start.profilesErrorBody: Please check your connection or just start writing a message. The app stays usable.
start.profilesEmptyTitle: No real AI profiles visible yet
start.profilesEmptyBody: As soon as real approved profiles are available, they will appear here with search, categories and direct chat.
start.discoveryText: {{count}} real AI profiles ready. Pick one and start writing.
start.freeOnlyNotice: Public and private profiles stay clearly separated. You choose who you want to chat with.

chat.replyIntro: I answer you directly from my role.
chat.replyMvp: I would look at it calmly: the world is full of speed, knowledge, and unrest at the same time.
chat.replyNextStep: What matters is to observe carefully, stay curious, and connect progress with responsibility.

dashboard.heroTitle: What would you like to do with an AI twin today?
dashboard.heroSubtitle: Choose a twin, ask directly or create your own twin.
dashboard.privateByDefaultText: IDrive E2 stores media, knowledge, backups and signed files. Salad only computes API, AI, search and cron jobs.
dashboard.introAuthed: Your twins, memories and conversations stay separate and under your control.
dashboard.introGuest: Sign in to store personal twins, memories and chat history securely.
dashboard.cardChatText: Talk to your digital twin. Ask questions and get answers in your style.
dashboard.cardUploadText: Add new memories. Texts, audio, photos and documents are processed automatically.
dashboard.cardSettingsText: Adjust your twin's personality. Manage values, tone of voice and access rights.
